Rejection_Reason: Too many videos rated with same pattern:
The scores for golden videos are not consistent with the true scores.
The scores for repeated videos are not consistent (4 > 3)
The delays in video ratings are too high
all slider ratings are very similar, the slider moved to same range of scores.
The scores for repeated videos are not consistent (5 > 3)
Low standard deviation of slider ratings, the slider was not moved much.
